reviews.comment:
Como toda estacion ACA, el personal muy atento.
Una critica para la institucion como socio:
Ya sea yendo para el interior, como viniendo hacia Buenos Aires, muy deficiente, diria casi nula la señaletica que avise al conductor por lo menos 500 mts antes donde esta ubicada y donde estan los accesos. Pienso que muchagente la ve  ya cuando esta pasando y no puede retornar!!. Me extraña de la institucion que no hagan nada al respecto, ya que son varios km que uno conduce sin ver un servicio. Lo digo como socio de mas de 30 años!!

(Translated by Google)
Like all ACA stations, the staff is very attentive.
One criticism for the institution as a member: Whether heading inland or coming towards Buenos Aires, the signage is very poor, I'd say almost nonexistent, to warn drivers at least 500 meters in advance of the station's location and access points. I think many people only see it when they're already passing by and can't turn around! I'm surprised the institution isn't doing anything about it, since it's several kilometers you drive without seeing any service. I say this as a member of over 30 years!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNJNXF5aEZREAE
